item.title: Better Homes and Gardens host Johanna Griggs reveals secret to the show’s success and why it’s still her dream job
item.description: The former champion swimmer spoke openly about her 22 years fronting the show.

item.title: Why Princess Catherine refused to sign an autograph while visiting Powys in Wales
item.description: She told the man she ‘can’t sign things,’ but can shake his hand.

item.title: Supporters call for review of conviction of political killing mastermind Phuong Ngo who was jailed 30 years ago
item.description: Supporters are fighting to release Phuong Ngo, arguing he’s spent decades in jail for a crime he says he never committed.

item.title: Aussie tennis star Ajla Tomljanovic loses quarter-final against Kimberly Birrell after ‘terrible scheduling situation’
item.description: ‘This shouldn’t be allowed.’

item.title: 600-million-year-old Australian fossil site tipped for World Heritage listing
item.description: A 58,000-hectare Australian expanse containing some of the world's oldest evidence of animal life could be included on the prestigious list.

item.title: Legendary Australian racehorse Makybe Diva dies aged 26
item.description: The three-time Melbourne Cup winner is being farewelled after a short battle.

item.title: 7NEWS The Issue Podcast: Telcos switching off tens of thousands of phones due to Triple-0 crisis. What to do if you’re affected
item.description: Here’s what you can do if you’re affected.

item.title: Former AFL player Jayden Hunt playing golf every day in bid to achieve PGA Tour dream
item.description: ‘I’m actually more sore now than I have been ever in my footy career, which is crazy.’

item.title: Townsville Fire win WNBL title in dramatic OT stunner away from home against Perth Lynx
item.description: Inspirational skipper Courtney Woods starred despite needing glue surgery after a blow to the head.

item.title: Delta Goodrem announced as Australia’s representative for the 70th Eurovision Song Contest
item.description: ‘I am so honoured to be representing Australia on one of the biggest music stages in the world.’

item.title: Lachie Neale marriage drama: Jules Neale rips into Brisbane Lions ex-husband in viral video
item.description: The former Brisbane Lions captain’s ex, Jules Neale, has been dropping hints for months, but this brutal video takes aim directly at Lachie.

item.title: 2026 Actor Awards: Highlights from the ceremony in Los Angeles as celebrities honoured with emotional tributes
item.description: Here is a full list of the winners.

item.title: Australian billionaire Adrian Portelli reports feeling safer surrounded by missile threats in Dubai than Melbourne
item.description: The high-profile entrepreneur said he’s more worried about food stains than missiles.

item.title: Legendary jockey Pat Hyland dies surrounded by family: ‘Deeply loved to the end’
item.description: The champion became an icon when he achieved one of Australian racing’s most famous feats in front of Prince Charles and Princess Diana.

item.title: Eric Dane’s official cause of death revealed following his brave battle with ALS
item.description: The 53-year-old Grey’s Anatomy star died last month.

item.title: Shane Warne’s daughter Summer claims patron poured water over her for dancing at Ed Sheeran concert
item.description: ‘God forbid I stand up at a concert’.

item.title: Mike Smithson: Inside the escalating fight for SA’s undecided voters ahead of election
item.description: There is only 18 days left to campaign for the 2026 SA election as regional seats take a key focus.

item.title: Jackie O’s KIIS FM contract terminated after feud with co-host Kyle Sandilands
item.description: Kyle Sandilands has been suspended for 14 days as his on-air behaviour comes under scrutiny.

item.title: ATP Challenger tennis players race off court at Fujairah Open after nearby explosions: ‘Get inside’
item.description: Players ‘heard the sounds of jets’ and quickly realised it was ‘not very safe’, as officials plotted escape routes out of the country.

item.title: Home and Away: Iconic WA filming locations revealed for their upcoming episodes filmed in the West
item.description: All the locations revealed: Brax (Stephen Peacocke) and Ricky (Bonnie Sveen) make their highly anticipated return to Home and Away 7.00pm Monday, March 9.

item.title: Aussie heavyweight Justis Huni announces boxing comeback after tragic death of trainer Keri Fui
item.description: The 26-year-old has been sidelined since his trainer suffered a heart attack during their workout and later died.

item.title: Ukrainian Igor Komarav reportedly killed after alleged kidnapping in Bali as dismembered remains found
item.description: The 28-year-old was holidaying with his girlfriend when he was allegedly snatched off the street.

item.title: Former world No.1 Jon Rahm levels damning ‘extortion’ accusation at European Tour
item.description: The two-time major champion has put forward a compromise but the fight looks set to rumble on.

item.title: Small business owners worry work-from-home laws will ‘create divide’ between workers
item.description: ‘Admin staff have the ... right to work from home but the blue-collar workers will have to come in.’

item.title: Labor maintains strong lead as One Nation surges in latest SA polling numbers
item.description: The Roy Morgan poll shows that South Australians are set to re-elect Premier Peter Malinauskas and the Labor Government with an increased majority.

item.title: Aldi lunchbox snack Bubble Bars recalled nationally after black rubber found in rice crispy treats
item.description: Eating the recalled snacks could cause illness or injury, Food Standards Australia said.

item.title: ‘Time is up’: Mounting calls for Medicare rebate to cover longer GP visits which are ‘essential’ for complex care
item.description: Peak health bodies believe the current rebate system unfairly punishes patients with complex needs.

item.title: Legendary broadcaster Bruce McAvaney pays heartbreaking tribute to great friend and ‘ultimate teammate’ Dennis Cometti
item.description: ‘I’ve lost something very precious.’

item.title: Finn Allen shatters records to spank South Africa and send New Zealand into T20 World Cup final
item.description: One of the all-time greats could not believe what he was seeing, while the ‘pure carnage’ left fans spinning.

item.title: Wedding bells ring for Australian favourites Noemie Fox and tennis champion Aryna Sabalenka
item.description: The ‘magical’ scenes have given sporting legends from the around the world ‘goosebumps’.

item.title: Age restrictions loom as e-bike and e-scooter safety recommendations handed down to Queensland government
item.description: Children under 16 are the main target of recommended reforms.

item.title: Photo gallery: All the best looks from the Melbourne Grand Prix’s Glamour on the Grid event
item.description: Jules Neale, AFL stars, and high-profile models have made an eye-catching appearance at the celebrity event.

item.title: Former Socceroos boss Graham Arnold stranded in UAE ahead of crucial World Cup play-off
item.description: The ongoing war in the Middle East could have major implications on football’s showpiece event this year.

item.title: Channel 7’s AFL predictions for the 2026 season: Premiers, Brownlow Medal winner, player to watch
item.description: Our expert commentators and award-winning journos are dropping bombs ahead of the AFL season.

item.title: Outback floods: Inland sea cuts off communities as floodwaters cover large parts of central west Queensland
item.description: ‘Road access in and out of these communities is going to take some time to be restored.’

item.title: 7NEWS Kiss and Kill: Former investigator Gerry Thornton opens up about what led to Louis Mahony’s downfall after murder of Lainie Coldwell
item.description: ‘He thought he was invincible.’

item.title: Coalition not scrapping $10k tradie bonus scheme, despite it being ‘inflationary’ and not ‘the answer’
item.description: This is despite the Shadow Minister for Skills calling the scheme ‘inflationary’, ‘wrong’ and ‘not the answer’.

item.title: ‘Put One Nation first’: Pauline Hanson’s party refuses to direct preferences in South Australia election
item.description: The party is projected to win at least one upper house seat in the March election.

item.title: Iran players backflip on national anthem before Matildas clash at the Women’s Asian Cup
item.description: The women changed tack to sing and salute before the high-profile match.

item.title: US-Israel-Iran war: ‘Wake up’: Israel calls on Australia to join Middle East war
item.description: ‘The war is now escalating on all fronts.’

item.title: Concerns mount for Matildas star Hayley Raso after second brutal head knock in 4-0 Asian Cup win over Iran
item.description: The distressed veteran left the pitch in tears at the end of a painful night on a personal front.

item.description: Follow along as we cover all the breaking news as the conflict between Iran, the United States and Israel escalates.

item.title: Kyle Sandilands considers legal action against ARN over potential sacking after split with Jackie ‘O’ Henderson
item.description: The host is facing accusations of serious misconduct as his longtime partnership with Jackie O ends.

item.title: Donald Trump fires Kristi Noem as homeland security secretary following drama-filled immigration crackdown
item.description: A White House official said the dumping was the result of ‘many unfortunate leadership failures’.

item.title: Britney Spears arrested in California on DUI charges
item.description: ‘Hopefully she can get the help and support she needs during this difficult time.’

item.title: Sam Kerr makes huge Mary Fowler prediction after drought-breaking Matildas goal against Iran
item.description: ‘She has got age on her side.’

item.title: Melbourne court battle looms as prosecutors appeal sentence given to ex-Neighbours actor Damien Richardson over Nazi salute
item.description: Authorities argue the unusual punishment does not go far enough.

item.title: Grave fears emerge for Iranian players after Asian Cup clash with Matildas: ‘Imminent danger’
item.description: A journalist has sounded the alarm and says the team is facing ‘arbitrary detention and execution’.

item.title: Penny Wong condemns Israeli minister’s plan to flatten Beirut like Gaza, addresses Aussies stuck in Middle East
item.description: Mass evacuations have been ordered in Lebanon’s capital as Israel targets the city with airstrikes.

item.description: While league bosses have been thumping chests another ‘miserable’ picture has been painted.

item.description: ‘I wasn’t done. None of us were.’

item.description: The popular presenter has been on leave since her 84-year-old mother disappeared in a suspected kidnapping.

item.title: Jackie ‘O’ Henderson breaks silence after radio split with Kyle Sandilands
item.description: She wanted to make ‘one important point very clear’ after days of misinformation.

item.description: Here’s what we know about the inquiry.

item.description: Fans have quickly turned on the Broncos superstar and theories are running wild.

item.description: Heavy machinery company Caterpillar has revealed a dual-cab pickup concept – but it appears to be little more than a Ford with a vinyl wrap.

item.description: McLaren's new endurance racer will spawn a customer version, but they won't be carbon copies of one another.

item.description: The toys were sold nationally, internationally, and online.

item.title: Spotlight | 7NEWS
item.description: The latest in Spotlight

item.title: The Morning Show: Australia's no. 1 Morning TV Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: The Morning Show with Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies is the latest news, lifestyle, recipes, entertainment and weather. The Morning Show brings you a mix of news, entertainment, lifestyle and human interest stories - Weekdays from 9:00am across Australia.

item.title: Sunrise: Australia's No. 1 Breakfast Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.

item.title: Ada Nicodemou opens up on engagement to James Stewart, Home And Away and food ahead of WA visit for Crab Fest
item.description: Onscreen, Ada Nicodemou and James Stewart’s characters have been married two years. Now a real-life wedding will follow, after Stewart recently proposed. Nicodemou opens up as they come to WA for Crab Fest.

item.title: Channel 7’s AFL women inspiring one generation after another while breaking glass ceilings
item.description: There is a new breed of fearless AFL commentator and together they are changing the game.

item.title: Iran, Israel and US war live updates: US President Donald Trump hints that Cuba could be next focus after Iran
item.description: Follow along as we cover all the breaking news as the conflict between Iran, the United States and Israel escalates.

item.title: Former AFL prospect Josh Hanlon crashes seconds into downhill run at Milano-Cortina Paralympics
item.description: The 28-year-old was an elite junior footballer until a bacterial infection forced amputations.

item.title: Porsche: PHEV owners are "driving mostly electric", but no word on plug-in 911
item.description: Porsche PHEV owners are doing plenty of EV-only driving, says the brand's local CEO, while reiterating the important role of hybrids moving forward.

item.title: Aussie players want Alyssa Healy promotion to open the batting for Test farewell
item.description: The retiring Aussie skipper’s teammates will be encouraging her to make one final move.

item.title: 2026 Denza D9 price and specs
item.description: The Denza D9 has arrived in Australia with a choice of loaded front-wheel drive or fully loaded all-wheel drive grades, both priced under $100,000.

item.title: Which new car should you buy your kid for their first car?
item.description: Buying your child a new car for their first car? Well, aren't they lucky! Here are some of our recommendations.

item.title: Brisbane captain Harris Andrews facing lengthy ban for severe hit on Western Bulldogs forward Arty Jones
item.description: Arty Jones laid flat on his face and had the battle scar to show for it after a swinging arm got him.

item.title: Three charged after good Samaritan killed in stabbing outside Mernda train station in Melbourne
item.description: Police described the alleged attack as ‘savage’.

item.title: Daniel Gorringe in public spat with Gerard Whateley after airing Sam Docherty voice recording
item.description: Gorringe has told the veteran broadcaster to ‘have a sook’ over the storm created by a private voice recording.

item.title: Lando Norris launches frustrated attack on new Formula One regulations: ‘It sucks’
item.description: The reigning Formula One champion has made it know he is filthy ahead of the Australian Grand Prix.

item.title: Notorious UK child murderer Ian Huntley dies a week after prison workshop attack
item.description: Ian Huntley had survived repeated attempts on his life before being bashed. Warning: Graphic

item.title: Kiss and Kill: Tyrone Thompson stabbed his ex-partner 78 times — so why was it a ‘mid‑range’ murder?
item.description: He breached orders eight times before the attack. Now experts say he may never change.

item.title: Supercars last matter of seconds at Albert Park before Broc Feeney becomes victim of first-corner pile-up
item.description: The cars ‘did not get 10 metres off the line’ before a ‘monstrous’ crash decimated the race at Albert Park.

item.title: Oscar Piastri out of Australian Grand Prix after crashing on lap to the grid
item.description: The crowd at Albert Park was in a state of shock when disaster struck for the hometown hero.

item.title: South Australia long weekend road toll grows with third fatality in Evanston, Adelaide
item.description: In separate crashes, a Harley Davidson rider, a young driver and a father died over the Adelaide Cup long weekend.

item.title: Melbourne driver attacked by hoons at illegal burnout meet in city's north
item.description: Footage showed the man being surrounded by a group of revellers before trading blows.

item.title: Women brutally attacked by disgraced Sydney dentist who was shot dead by police in Potts Point reveal injuries
item.description: Friends of one of the victims have rallied to support the much-loved wellness therapist.

item.title: Brisbane’s loss to Bulldogs compounded by bans to trio Harris Andrews, Zac Bailey and Darcy Gardiner
item.description: The match review officer came down hard on the Lions with three players suspended.

item.title: Mercedes completes one-two as George Russell wins Australian Grand Prix ahead of Kimi Antonelli
item.description: The teammates finished well clear of the field after Ferrari’s pit strategy failed miserably.

item.title: Oscar Piastri accepts responsibility for pre-race crash that ended his Australian Grand Prix hopes
item.description: The Aussie cut a dejected figure as he apologised to fans for the devastating situation.

item.title: Aidan Becker identified as man allegedly killed after stepping in to protect teen at Mernda station, Melbourne
item.description: Three people have been detained, while a fourth is yet to be interviewed by police.

item.title: Legend Alyssa Healy bows out in style as Australia complete 10-wicket over India
item.description: The much-loved champion was chaired off the field as she bid farewell to cricket.
